description: Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc. develops and provides a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) solution for automated investment data aggregation, reconciliation, accounting, and reporting services in the United States and internationally. It offers portfolio management, order and execution management systems (OEMS), investment accounting, reconciliation, regulatory reporting, performance measurement, compliance monitoring, and risk analytics.
